 {"id":"bd-2b82","title":"Text Effects: Demo Showcase Integration","description":"## Background
The visual_effects screen needs to showcase all new text effects in an impressive, navigable demo that serves as both documentation and a selling point for FrankenTUI.

## Implementation

### Navigation Structure
```
Tab 1: Gradients    - Horizontal, Vertical, Diagonal, Radial, Animated
Tab 2: Animations   - Wave, Bounce, Shake, Cascade, Pulse, Breathing
Tab 3: Typography   - Shadow, Glow, Outline, Mirror, ASCII Art
Tab 4: Special FX   - Glitch, Chromatic, Scanline, Particle, Matrix
Tab 5: Presets      - All 10 presets with descriptions
Tab 6: Combinations - User can toggle effects on/off
```

### Key Features
1. Spacebar cycles through effects within current tab
2. TransitionOverlay shows effect name + description on switch
3. Number keys 1-6 switch tabs
4. 'e' key toggles easing comparison mode
5. 'c' key enters combination builder

### Visual Layout
```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ [Gradients] [Animations] [Typography] ...    │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                             │
│         EFFECT DEMO TEXT                    │
│         (with current effect)               │
│                                             │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Effect: Rainbow Gradient                    │
│ Speed: 0.3  │  Easing: EaseInOut           │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Space: next │ ←→: adjust │ Tab: category   │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### ASCII Art Header
Use AsciiArtText with Block style for 'EFFECTS' title, animated gradient.

## Files
- crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/visual_effects.rs

## Testing

### Unit Tests
- test_tab_navigation: Keys switch tabs correctly
- test_effect_cycling: Spacebar advances effect index
- test_transition_triggers: Effect change starts transition

### E2E Tests (in scripts/demo_showcase_e2e.sh)
```bash
# Navigate through all tabs and effects
echo 'Testing visual effects screen navigation...'
# Send key sequence: 1,space,space,2,space,3...
# Verify no panics, all effects render
```

## Acceptance
- All 6 tabs implemented
- All effects showcased
- Smooth transitions between effects
- No rendering glitches
- Help text updated with new keybindings

## Acceptance Criteria
- Deliver the behavior implied by the title: Text Effects: Demo Showcase Integration
- Alien Artifact: define invariants + failure modes; if heuristics exist, specify an explainable decision rule (evidence ledger / Bayes factors where applicable)
- Extreme Optimization: baseline -> profile -> opportunity matrix; for each perf change include an isomorphism proof + golden output checksums
- Unit tests: happy path + edge cases + regression fixtures; add property tests for core invariants where applicable
- E2E: scripts with verbose JSONL logging (env, capabilities, timings, seed, checksums) + deterministic mode

 {"id":"bd-2bzl","title":"Text Effects: AsciiArtText Integration","description":"## Background
AsciiArtText exists but doesn't fully integrate with the effect system. Multi-line text needs:
- Consistent effect application across all rows
- Reflection support (already partly addressed)
- Gradient mapping that makes sense for 2D text

## Implementation

### StyledText from AsciiArt:
```rust
impl StyledText {
    /// Create StyledText from AsciiArtText for multi-line rendering
    pub fn from_ascii_art(art: AsciiArtText) -> StyledMultiLine {
        StyledMultiLine {
            lines: art.render_lines(),
            effects: Vec::new(),
            // ...
        }
    }
}

/// Multi-line text with effects
pub struct StyledMultiLine {
    lines: Vec<String>,
    effects: Vec<TextEffect>,
    easing: Easing,
    time: f64,
    reflection: Option<Reflection>,
}
```

### Effect Application for 2D:
When applying effects to multi-line text:
- Gradients use 2D coordinates (x=char, y=row)
- Wave can affect y-offset per row
- Glow/Shadow renders around entire block

### Render Method:
```rust
impl Widget for StyledMultiLine {
    fn render(&self, area: Rect, frame: &mut Frame) {
        for (row_idx, line) in self.lines.iter().enumerate() {
            let row_y = area.y + row_idx as u16;
            // Apply effects with 2D context
            self.render_line(line, area.x, row_y, row_idx, self.lines.len(), frame);
        }
        
        // Render reflection if present
        if let Some(ref reflection) = self.reflection {
            self.render_reflection(area, frame, reflection);
        }
    }
}
```

## Files
crates/ftui-extras/src/text_effects.rs

## Unit Tests
- test_ascii_art_to_styled: Conversion preserves lines
- test_multiline_gradient_2d: Gradient uses x and y
- test_multiline_effects_apply: Each line gets effects
- test_multiline_with_reflection: Reflection renders below

## Visual Tests
- Snapshot 5-line 'HELLO' with vertical gradient
- Snapshot same with reflection

## Acceptance Criteria
- Deliver the behavior implied by the title: Text Effects: AsciiArtText Integration
- Alien Artifact: define invariants + failure modes; if heuristics exist, specify an explainable decision rule (evidence ledger / Bayes factors where applicable)
- Extreme Optimization: baseline -> profile -> opportunity matrix; for each perf change include an isomorphism proof + golden output checksums
- Unit tests: happy path + edge cases + regression fixtures; add property tests for core invariants where applicable
- E2E: scripts with verbose JSONL logging (env, capabilities, timings, seed, checksums) + deterministic mode
